visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a fuzzy light gray cardigan over a black top, stands inside a Costco warehouse. She holds a vacuum-sealed package of marinated chicken legs toward the camera. In the background, the refrigerated meat aisle and other shoppers are visible under bright fluorescent lighting. (2) A close-up view focuses on the chicken product, showing the DaChan brand label and seasoning. Colorful text bubbles with Chinese characters and floral graphics float around the package. The woman's manicured hands carefully rotate the package to show different angles of the meat. (3) The scene shifts to another woman with short hair wearing a black and white bucket hat and a beige top. She stands in the same supermarket setting, pointing and gesturing enthusiastically while discussing the product's price and value compared to regular chicken breasts. (4) The setting transitions to a home kitchen counter with various bottles of vitamins and supplements in the background. A pair of hands is seen placing a baking tray lined with parchment paper and raw marinated chicken thighs into a silver countertop toaster oven. (5) The oven door is opened, revealing the chicken thighs now cooked to a golden-brown, crispy texture. A knife and tongs are used to flip and then cut the chicken on a yellow Pompompurin-themed plate, showcasing the juicy interior of the meat.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 好市多. (2) [Slogan]: 限時特價! [Subtitle]: 臺灣羅勒去骨雞腿肉. (3) [Subtitle]: 幫你去好骨. 現在特價. 每一包. 特價130元. (4) [Subtitle]: 而且它是大成雞. 你這樣6袋只需要549. (5) [Subtitle]: 而且它已經幫你醃好了. 所以你回去直接加熱就可以吃了. (6) [Subtitle]: 而且羅勒感覺不會出錯. (7) [Subtitle]: 他特價完的價格. 因為我們清雞胸肉. 是一公斤215元. 215元. 然後這個醃過都幫你醃好的哦. 一公斤變219. (8) [Subtitle]: 超便宜 很輕鬆. 但是 好不好吃才是重點. 回家試吃看. (9) [Subtitle]: 大家好我是比爾. 那我們今天就來料理我們的羅勒雞腿肉. 然後它的大小大概是兩隻手掌這麼大. (10) [Subtitle]: 然后我们烤箱先预热180度. 10分钟 180度 气炸锅. (11) [Subtitle]: 烤完正面啦 準備翻面. 哇塞 超漂亮的. 翻面180度 10分鐘氣炸鍋. (12) [Subtitle]: 這就是完成的樣子啦. 我覺得口味的話 調味不會非常重. 雞腿烤的也是非常恰到好處 非常好吃. 如果有特價的話 非常推薦去買喔. 讚.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, approximately 10 shoppers in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a gray fuzzy cardigan; the other has short hair and a black/white bucket hat with a beige blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a wide Costco warehouse with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and refrigerated meat cases. The second location is a domestic kitchen with a white countertop and a silver toaster oven.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic female voice begins narration with high pitch and arousal over an upbeat pop BGM with a steady electronic pulse. (2) A digital 'pop' sound effect triggers as the speaker highlights price points. (3) A second female voice takes over, speaking with professional clarity and high energy about cost savings. (4) A metallic 'thud' and 'creak' occurs as a male voice ('Bill') starts an instructional segment. (5) A mechanical 'click' of an oven dial is heard alongside the male speaker's explanation of 180-degree preheating. (6) A metallic 'clink' sound as the oven door is opened again to check the food. (7) A sharp, percussive 'crunch' sound follows as a knife slices through the crispy chicken skin, accompanied by satisfied vocal inflections. (8) A final digital 'ding' sound plays as the male speaker gives a positive recommendation, and the BGM reaches its conclusion.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Price Comparison -> Cooking Demo -> Tasting Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the 'Taiwan Basil Boneless Chicken Thighs' sold at Costco by demonstrating its value, price, and ease of preparation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names Costco and the brand DaChan, highlights a specific limited-time price, and provides a 'buy recommendation' at the end.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-production-value social media short-form video using fast cuts, vibrant text overlays, and dual-perspective narration to drive commercial engagement.
